hook.text: UNITED'S NEW SEASON FIXTURES ARE OUT TOMORROW

beats.text: THE PREMIER LEAGUE SCHEDULE DROPS AT 10AM BST
UNITED ARE BACK IN THE CHAMPIONS LEAGUE
THE NEW CAMPAIGN STARTS ON AUGUST 22

caption: The wait is nearly over 🔴 Manchester United's 2026/27 Premier League fixtures drop tomorrow morning at 10am BST — we'll finally find out who Carrick's side face first in what promises to be a massive new campaign. United are back in the Champions League, the season starts August 22 — a week later than usual to account for the World Cup. Who do you want as the opening day opponent? 👇 #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football
